name: DashboardClaw
description: Enhanced gateway UI with auto-reconnect, WebSocket handling, File API, file upload/download, and security

maxReconnectAttempts.description: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up

maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes for File API operations (default: 10MB)

autoReconnectOnGap.description: Automatically reconnect when an event-gap message is detected

autoReconnectOnVisibility.description: Automatically reconnect when the tab becomes visible after being hidden

visibilityReconnectThresholdMs.description: How long the tab must be hidden (ms) before a visibility reconnect is triggered (default: 30s)

authToken.description: Optional Bearer token to protect API/terminal endpoints. Leave empty to use gateway auth only.

corsOrigin.description: Allowed CORS origin (e.g. 'https://my-gateway.example.com'). Empty = same-origin only.

maxUploadSize.description: Maximum upload file size in bytes (default: 50MB)
